_**User**_

主题：把 Aider 纳入工作流 + 本机环境
1. Aider 是什么、怎么「管项目」
Aider 是终端里的 AI 结对编程工具，和 Git 紧耦合；不是 Jira 类项目管理，而是改代码、多文件、配合提交。
常用点：在仓库根用、用聊天命令（如 /add）控制上下文、Code / Ask 等模式分工（以官方命令文档为准）。
Repository Map（地图）：用 tree-sitter 等生成全库结构摘要（类/方法/关键行），按图 + 相关度裁进预算，减少重复塞全文的 token/算力；可用 --map-tokens 控制地图约多少 token（默认约 1k 量级—以当时文档为准）。
.aiderignore：排掉大资源/缓存/不必索引的路径，减轻噪音、省资源（团队可提交进库统一）。
2. 与「技能羽毛球」的约定
用户要求：技能羽毛球 先搁置，之后聊天默认不围绕该 Godot 项目；除非用户明确说继续搞它。
3. 本机环境检查结果（Windows）
Git：有（例如 2.53.x），可用于 Aider 的仓库习惯。
Python：实际安装在
C:\Users\72988\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\
版本约 3.13.13；可用 py -3 或完整路径调起。
pip：已随该 Python 安装；可用 py -3 -m pip；pip 可执行文件 在 ...\Python313\Scripts\。
曾问题：python 可能先命中 Windows 商店占位符；pip 若未进 PATH 会「找不到命令」。
4. 已代你执行过的步骤（补环境）
已将 Python313 目录 与 Scripts 目录 加入用户环境变量 Path 的最前（并做了去重整理），使 python / pip 优先于 WindowsApps 里的假入口。
需用户侧：重启 Cursor/终端 后重试 python --version / pip --version；若仍进商店，在 系统设置 → 应用执行别名 里关掉 python/python3 的 Microsoft Store 开关。
5. 仍未在本机看到的东西（给下一聊天用）
Aider 本身：需安装（例如用 py -3 -m pip install aider-chat 或当时官方推荐方式）。
模型 API：常见变量如 ANTHROPIC_API_KEY / OPENAI_API_KEY 等在当时检查的 User/Machine/当前进程里未配置；实际是否已在别处配好，下一聊天可再 echo/环境变量确认一次，不要贴 Key 到聊天里。
6. Cursor 里「为什么还显示技能羽毛球」
工作区 = 用「文件 → 打开文件夹」选中的目录；集成终端默认在该目录，所以提示符会带技能羽毛球路径。
换工作区：文件 → 打开文件夹 选新目录；或 新窗口 再开新文件夹；文件 → 打开最近 可快速切。
7. 你们后续可接上的话题
选定 Aider 用的模型/厂商，定 Key 与启动命令（--model、--map-tokens 等）。
为「所有项目」定 .aiderignore 模板 与和 Cursor 的分工（谁主写/谁主跑/谁省 token）。
把上面整段复制到新聊天即可；若你希望更短/只要清单不要解释，可以说一声我缩成 10 行版。

- **技能羽毛球 / Godot**：**先搁置**；之后除非你明确说继续搞，否则**默认不围绕那个项目**聊。

- **待办（下一环境回合）**：本机装 **Aider**（如 `py -3 -m pip install aider-chat` 或当时官方方式）；在**非聊天里**配好模型 **API Key**（可用环境变量名核对，**不要把 Key 贴到聊天**）。

```json
{
  "markdown": "\u003e ## Documentation Index\n\u003e \n\u003e Fetch the complete documentation index at: https://docs.cline.bot/llms.txt\n\u003e Use this file to discover all available pages before exploring further.\n\n# Installing Cline\n\n\u003e Get Cline up and running in your favorite IDE or terminal with these simple installation steps\n\n## Before You Begin\n\n1. Create your account at [app.cline.bot](https://app.cline.bot/login) for access to multiple AI models, seamless setup without managing API keys, and occasional free inferencing.\n2. Choose your platform: VS Code, Cursor, Antigravity, JetBrains IDEs, CLI (macOS/Linux preview), Zed, Neovim, VSCodium, or Windsurf.\n\n## Installation Instructions\n\n## VS Code/Cursor/Antigravity\n\n## Open VS Code, Cursor, or Antigravity\n\nLaunch the editor on your computer.\n\n## Open Extensions\n\nPress &#96;Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + X&#96; or click the Extensions icon in the Activity Bar.\n\n## Search for Cline\n\nType \"Cline\" in the search bar.\n\n## Install\n\nClick the Install button on the Cline extension.\n\n## Access Cline\n\nClick the Cline icon in the Activity Bar, or open Command Palette (&#96;Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + P&#96;) and type \"Cline: Open In New Tab\".\n\nIf VS Code shows \"Running extensions might...\" dialog, click Allow. If you don't see the Cline icon, restart VS Code.\n\n## JetBrains IDEs\n\nCline for JetBrains works almost identically to VS Code, with all core features: diff editing, tools, multiple API providers, MCP servers, Cline rules/workflows, and more.\n\n## Open your JetBrains IDE\n\nLaunch IntelliJ IDEA, PyCharm, WebStorm, or any JetBrains IDE.\n\n## Open Settings\n\nPress &#96;Ctrl+Alt+S&#96; (Windows/Linux) or &#96;Cmd+,&#96; (macOS).\n\n## Navigate to Plugins\n\nGo to Plugins → Marketplace tab.\n\n## Install Cline\n\nSearch for \"Cline\" and click Install.\n\n## Restart IDE\n\nRestart your IDE to complete the installation.\n\nFind Cline in View → Tool Windows → Cline (usually on the right side).\n\n## Alternative Installation Methods\n\nBrowser Install:\n\n1. Go to the [JetBrains Marketplace](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/28247-cline)\n2. Click Install to IDE\n3. Confirm in your IDE and restart\n\nManual Install:\n\n1. Download from the [marketplace page](https://plugins.jetbrains.com/plugin/28247-cline)\n2. Go to Settings → Plugins → gear icon → Install Plugin from Disk\n3. Select the downloaded &#96;.zip&#96; file and restart\n\n## Terminal Integration Difference\n\nJetBrains shows terminal output differently than VS Code. In VS Code, output streams directly to chat. In JetBrains, output appears in collapsible \"Command Output\" sections.\n\nCommands execute successfully in both. Expand the section to see results in JetBrains.\n\n## CLI\n\nPreview Release: Cline CLI is currently in preview and only available for macOS and Linux. Windows support is coming soon.\n\nCline CLI runs AI coding agents directly in your terminal. Use it for automated code reviews in CI/CD, multi-instance development, or shell workflow integration.\n\n## Install Node.js 20+\n\nCheck your version with &#96;node --version&#96;. If needed, visit [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org/) or use nvm.\n\n## Install Cline CLI\n\nRun &#96;npm install -g cline&#96; in your terminal.\n\n## Authenticate\n\nRun &#96;cline auth&#96; to sign in and configure your AI model provider.\n\n## Run Cline\n\nRun &#96;cline&#96; to start an interactive session, or &#96;cline \"Your task here\"&#96; for headless execution.\n\nWant to learn more? See the [Cline CLI documentation](https://docs.cline.bot/cline-cli/getting-started) for advanced usage patterns like multi-instance development and CI/CD integration.\n\n## Zed/Neovim (ACP via CLI)\n\nACP (Agent Client Protocol) lets you run Cline in any ACP-compatible editor via the CLI. This gives you full access to Cline's capabilities—including Skills, Hooks, and MCP integrations—in your preferred editor.\n\n## Install Node.js 20+\n\nCheck your version with &#96;node --version&#96;. If needed, visit [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org/) or use nvm.\n\n## Install Cline CLI\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\nnpm install -g cline\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Authenticate\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;bash\ncline auth\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\n## Configure your editor\n\n## Zed\n\nOpen Zed settings (&#96;Cmd/Ctrl + ,&#96;) and add Cline to your &#96;settings.json&#96;:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;json\n{\n  \"agent_servers\": {\n    \"Cline\": {\n      \"type\": \"custom\",\n      \"command\": \"cline\",\n      \"args\": [\"--acp\"],\n      \"env\": {}\n    }\n  }\n}\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nThen open the AI assistant panel, select Cline from the agent dropdown, and start coding.\n\n## Neovim (agentic.nvim)\n\nInstall [agentic.nvim](https://github.com/carlos-algms/agentic.nvim) using lazy.nvim:\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;lua\n{\n  \"carlos-algms/agentic.nvim\",\n  opts = {\n    provider = \"cline-acp\",\n    acp_providers = {\n      [\"cline-acp\"] = {\n        command = \"cline\",\n        args = {\"--acp\"},\n      },\n    },\n  },\n  keys = {\n    {\"\u003cC-\\\\\u003e\", function() require(\"agentic\").toggle() end, mode={\"n\",\"v\",\"i\"}, desc=\"Toggle Cline Chat\"},\n  },\n}\n\n&#96;&#96;&#96;\n\nPress &#96; &#96; to toggle the Cline chat panel.\n\n## Neovim (avante.nvim)\n\nFollow the [avante.nvim documentation](https://github.com/yetone/avante.nvim) for configuring external ACP agents and point it to &#96;cline --acp&#96;.\n\nFor full details on ACP editor integrations—including JetBrains ACP setup and troubleshooting—see the [ACP Editor Integrations](https://docs.cline.bot/cline-cli/acp-editor-integrations) guide.\n\n## VSCodium/Windsurf\n\nThese editors use the Open VSX Registry instead of the VS Code Marketplace, but the installation process is nearly identical.\n\n## Open your editor\n\nLaunch VSCodium, Windsurf, or another Open VSX-compatible editor.\n\n## Open Extensions\n\nPress &#96;Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + X&#96;.\n\n## Search for Cline\n\nType \"Cline\" in the search bar.\n\n## Install\n\nSelect \"Cline\" by saoudrizwan and click Install.\n\n## Reload\n\nReload your editor if prompted.\n\nLook for the Cline icon in your Activity Bar or use the Command Palette.\n\n## Sign In \u0026 Start Building\n\nCLI users: If you installed via CLI, you already authenticated during setup with &#96;cline auth&#96;. You're ready to go!\n\n1. Open Cline in your editor:\n\n- VS Code/Cursor/Antigravity/VSCodium/Windsurf: Click the Cline icon in the Activity Bar\n- JetBrains: Go to View → Tool Windows → Cline\n\n1. Sign in by clicking the Sign Up button in the Cline interface. You'll be redirected to [app.cline.bot](https://app.cline.bot/) to authenticate.\n\nLearn more about [authorizing with Cline](https://docs.cline.bot/getting-started/authorizing-with-cline), including how OAuth authentication works, using API keys with other providers, and troubleshooting auth issues.\n\n1. Start building! After signing in, you'll automatically return to your editor-Cline is ready to help.\n\n## Setting Up Cline in the Right Sidebar\n\nFor the best coding experience, we recommend moving Cline to the right sidebar. This keeps your project files visible on the left while you chat with Cline on the right, giving you full visibility of your codebase as Cline works.\n\n## VS Code\n\n## Align Extension View\n\nMake sure your extension view is aligned vertically to the left.\n\n## Open Right Side View\n\nClick the button that opens the right side panel (typically used for GitHub Copilot chat), or use &#96;Option + Cmd/Ctrl + B&#96;.\n\n## Drag Cline Icon\n\nDrag the Cline icon over to the nav panel at the top of that right view.\n\n## Cursor\n\n## Set Vertical Activity Bar\n\nCursor uses a horizontal activity bar by default. To switch to vertical:\n\n1. Open Command Palette (&#96;Cmd/Ctrl + Shift + P&#96;)\n2. Search for \"Preferences: Open Settings (UI)\"\n3. Search for &#96;workbench.activityBar.orientation&#96;\n4. Set the value to &#96;vertical&#96;\n5. Restart Cursor\n\n## Open the AI Pane\n\nClick the Cursor cube icon (AI Pane) to open the right side view panel.\n\n## Drag Cline to the AI Pane\n\nDrag the Cline icon directly into the AI Pane sidebar.\n\n## Troubleshooting\n\n### Can't Find Cline in the Marketplace\n\nSometimes Cline doesn't show up in search results if you're looking in the wrong tab or using an incompatible IDE version. Make sure you're searching in the Marketplace tab (not Installed), try searching for \"Cline AI\" instead, and verify your IDE is up to date. If installation fails, restart your IDE and check your internet connection.\n\n### Cline Icon Not Appearing After Install\n\nThe most common fix is a full restart-close your IDE completely (File → Exit) and reopen it. In VS Code/Cursor/VSCodium, you can also open the Command Palette (&#96;Ctrl/Cmd + Shift + P&#96;) and type \"Cline: Open In New Tab\". In JetBrains, check View → Tool Windows → Cline. If it's still missing, verify the plugin is enabled in your Extensions/Plugins settings.\n\n### CLI: Node.js or Permission Errors\n\nCline CLI requires Node.js 20 or higher. Run &#96;node --version&#96; to check-if you need to upgrade, use nvm (&#96;nvm install 22 \u0026\u0026 nvm use 22&#96;) or download from [nodejs.org](https://nodejs.org/). For permission errors on &#96;npm install -g&#96;, either prefix with &#96;sudo&#96; on macOS/Linux or configure npm to use a user-owned directory for global packages.\n\n### Plugin Installed But Not Working\n\nIf Cline appears installed but doesn't respond, try disabling and re-enabling the extension in your IDE's settings. Check the Developer Console (VS Code: Help → Toggle Developer Tools) or Event Log (JetBrains) for error messages. Also ensure you're using a supported IDE version and close any resource-intensive extensions that might interfere.\n\n## Need Help?\n\n- Join our [Discord community](https://discord.gg/cline) for support, tips, and discussions.\n- [Read the docs](https://docs.cline.bot/getting-started/authorizing-with-cline) to explore model selection guides and advanced features.",
  "url": "https://docs.cline.bot/features/customization/opening-cline-in-sidebar"
}
```

_**Agent (default)**_

已确认你本机 Cursor 里安装了 **Cline**（扩展 ID：`saoudrizwan.claude-dev`）。我这边不能替你点界面，用下面任一种就能「调出」Cline：

## 最快：命令面板

1. **`Ctrl+Shift+P`**
2. 输入 **`Cline`** 或 **`Cline: Open In New Tab`**
3. 选 **Cline: Open In New Tab**（与 [官方说明](https://docs.cline.bot/features/customization/opening-cline-in-sidebar) 一致）

## 用图标

- 看 **左侧/顶部活动栏** 里 **Cline** 的图标（和 VS Code 扩展区里「Cline / saoudrizwan」是同一个扩展），点一下即可。  
- 在 **Cursor** 里若 Cline 在右侧 **AI 面板** 里，先点 **右侧 AI/立方体** 打开侧栏，再在那一栏里点 **Cline**；也可以按文档把 Cline 拖进 AI 侧栏固定。

## 若仍看不到

- 完全退出 Cursor 再开，或 **`Ctrl+Shift+X`** 搜 **Cline**，确认已 **启用**（未禁用它）。  
- 仍无图标：再跑一遍上面 **`Cline: Open In New Tab`**。

需要的话，我可以帮你在本仓库加一条 **工作区键盘快捷键**（例如绑定到你顺手的一个键）专门执行「Cline: Open In New Tab」，你告诉我想用哪个键组合即可。

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
Windows prioritizes machine-level paths before user-level paths. So the effective order is:
- Machine: ... includes `C:\Users\72988\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps` in the middle
- User: .local\bin, Python313, ... comes AFTER entire Machine block

When cmd looks for `python`, it might find something in Machine before reaching User. Since `python` is typically in WindowsApps in Machine, **Machine's WindowsApps** is searched before **User's** Python313!

The fix for "python goes to real install" is either:
- Add Python to **System** PATH ahead of WindowsApps (requires admin)
- Remove WindowsApps from Machine PATH (not ideal)</details></think>

_**Agent (default)**_

_**Agent (default)**_

<tool-use data-tool-type="shell" data-tool-name="run_terminal_command_v2">
<details><summary>Tool use: **run_terminal_command_v2** • Run command: $py = "C:\Users\72988\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313"
$sc = "$py\Scripts"
$ub = "C:\Users\72988\.local\bin"
try {
  $m = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("Path", "Machine")
  $mParts = if ($m) { $m -split ';' | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() } | Where-Object { $_ } } else { @() }
  $priority = @($ub, $py, $sc)
  $seen = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
  $ordered = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
  foreach ($p in $priority) { if ($p -and $seen.Add($p)) { $ordered.Add($p) } }
  foreach ($p in $mParts) { if ($p -and -not $seen.Contains($p)) { [void]$seen.Add($p); $ordered.Add($p) } }
  $newM = $ordered -join ";"

} catch {

}</summary>

```bash
$py = "C:\Users\72988\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313"
$sc = "$py\Scripts"
$ub = "C:\Users\72988\.local\bin"
try {
  $m = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("Path", "Machine")
  $mParts = if ($m) { $m -split ';' | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() } | Where-Object { $_ } } else { @() }
  $priority = @($ub, $py, $sc)
  $seen = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
  $ordered = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
  foreach ($p in $priority) { if ($p -and $seen.Add($p)) { $ordered.Add($p) } }
  foreach ($p in $mParts) { if ($p -and -not $seen.Contains($p)) { [void]$seen.Add($p); $ordered.Add($p) } }
  $newM = $ordered -join ";"
  [Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("Path", $newM, "Machine")
  Write-Output "OK: Machine PATH updated (prepending aider + Python313 + Scripts)"
} catch {
  Write-Output "FAILED (need Admin): $($_.Exception.Message)"
}
```

_**Agent (default)**_

已经做完「能在用户环境里持久生效」的部分；**需要管理员**的一步我这边没权限代你点 UAC，下面分开说明。

## 已替你执行并生效的（所有用户终端 / 新工程通用）

1. **检查并整理「用户」PATH**（去重、固定顺序）  
   最前面依次是：  
   - `C:\Users\72988\.local\bin`（`aider`）  
   - `C:\Users\72988\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313`  
   - `C:\Users\72988\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313\Scripts`（`pip` 等）  

2. 说明：**`aider`** 在 `.local\bin` 里、系统里一般没有同名，所以新开的 CMD/PowerShell 里，**`aider` 多数情况已经能直接用**。  

3. **`py -3` / `pip`（作为模块）** 不依赖和商店抢 `python` 这个名字，继续可用。

## 需要管理员或系统设置，才能「全局稳用 `python` 命令」

在 Windows 里，**先搜「系统」PATH，再搜「用户」PATH**。你机器上 **系统 PATH 里**已经有一段  
`...\WindowsApps`，里面的 **`python` 会排在用户目录里真实 Python 前面**，所以只改用户 PATH 无法保证在**每一个**新终端里 `python` 都进 3.13。

我尝试把 Python 和 `.local\bin` **写到「系统」PATH 最前**，当前环境**没有提权**，被拒绝（需管理员注册表权限）。

**请你任选其一：**

1. **推荐（无改系统 PATH）**  
   **设置 → 应用 → 高级应用设置（或 应用执行别名）** → 关闭 **「应用安装程序」的 `python` / `python3`** 之类别名，再开新终端试 `python --version`。  
   这样常就能让用户 PATH 里的 Python 生效。

2. **一次性系统 PATH**（需管理员）  
   在 **以管理员身份打开** 的 PowerShell 里执行（整段复制即可）：

```powershell
$ub = "C:\Users\72988\.local\bin"
$py = "C:\Users\72988\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python313"
$sc = "$py\Scripts"
$m = [Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable("Path", "Machine")
$parts = if ($m) { $m -split ';' | ForEach-Object { $_.Trim() } | Where-Object { $_ } } else { @() }
$pri = @($ub, $py, $sc)
$seen = [System.Collections.Generic.HashSet[string]]::new([StringComparer]::OrdinalIgnoreCase)
$ord = [System.Collections.Generic.List[string]]::new()
foreach ($p in $pri) { if ($p -and $seen.Add($p)) { $ord.Add($p) } }
foreach ($p in $parts) { if ($p -and -not $seen.Contains($p)) { [void]$seen.Add($p); $ord.Add($p) } }
[Environment]::SetEnvironmentVariable("Path", ($ord -join ";"), "Machine")
```

3. 不想动系统/别名时：脚本里继续用 **`py -3`** 即可，与 PATH 争名无关。

---

**请你本地再做一步：** 关掉当前 Cursor/终端，**开一个新终端**，再试：

- `aider --version`  
- `py -3 --version`  
- 若关别名或已管理员改系统 PATH 后，再试 `python --version`  

我这边在「合并了 Machine+User 的 PATH」的会话里已经验证过 **`aider` 和 `pip` 能正常跑**；`python` 因上述顺序问题仍可能 9009，需要按上面对齐别名或系统 PATH。若你愿意，你执行完第 1 或第 2 步后，把**新终端**里三条命令的输出发我（不要发任何 Key），我可以帮你确认是否完全对齐。

[How To Use Windows Settings App With MS-Settings URI Scheme (Including A Complete List Of Them) | by Danilo Bilanoski | Medium](https://medium.com/@dbilanoski/how-to-use-windows-settings-app-with-ms-settings-uri-scheme-including-a-complete-list-of-them-52c19f83f3bd)\n2. [Windows 11: MS-Settings URI commands (complete list) - Pureinfotech](https://pureinfotech.com/windows-11-mssettings-uri-commands/)\n3. [Launch Windows Settings - Windows apps | Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/apps/develop/launch/launch-settings)\n4. [Launch the default Windows app for a URI - Windows apps | Microsoft Learn](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/apps/develop/launch/launch-default-app)\n5. [How to launch the Settings app (XAML) (Windows) | Microsoft Learn](https://msdn.microsoft.com/en-us/previous-versions/windows/apps/dn741261(v=win.10))\n\n# MS-Settings URI and App Execution\n\n## What is MS-Settings URI?\n\nThe &#96;ms-settings:&#96; URI scheme is a collection of predefined commands that allows you to launch specific Windows Settings pages directly.[1][2] This feature is particularly useful for automation tasks, creating shortcuts, and administrative purposes.[1]\n\n## How to Use MS-Settings URI\n\nYou can execute ms-settings commands from multiple locations:[1][2]\n\n1. **Run dialog** (Windows key + R)\n2. **File Explorer address bar** (Windows key + E)\n3. **Command Prompt or PowerShell**\n4. **Windows shortcuts**\n\nThe basic syntax is: &#96;ms-settings:&#96; followed by a colon and the page's unique name. For example: &#96;ms-settings:bluetooth&#96; or &#96;ms-settings:network-wifi&#96;.[2]\n\n## App Integration\n\nFor developers, the &#96;ms-settings:&#96; URI scheme can be integrated using the &#96;LaunchUriAsync&#96; method in Windows Runtime (WinRT) APIs.[3] This allows apps to programmatically launch specific Settings pages, which is important for privacy-aware applications that need to direct users to relevant permission settings.[3]\n\n## Scope\n\nThe ms-settings URI scheme covers numerous settings categories including Accounts, Apps, Devices, Ease of Access, Network, Personalization, Privacy, System, and more.[2][3] The availability of some settings pages varies by Windows version and SKU.[3]",

## 你选「方案 1」时要做的事（关商店别名）

在已打开的设置里按下面做（不同语言界面名字略有差异）：

1. 在左侧或同一页里找到 **「高级应用设置」** / **Advanced app settings**（有时在 **应用** 大类下）。  
2. 点 **「应用执行别名」** / **App execution aliases**。  
3. 在列表里找到与 **python** 相关的项（常见显示为 **应用安装程序** / **App Installer** 的 **`python.exe`**、**`python3.exe`**）。  
4. 把对应开关 **全部关掉**（关 = 表示不用商店占位、不再抢 `python` 这个名字）。

改完**立即生效**，一般不用重启电脑。

**然后**，关掉当前 **Cursor 里的终端** 或整个 **重开一次 Cursor**，在新终端里执行：

```text
python --version
```

应能指向你装好的 **3.13.x**（`...\Python313\`）。若仍异常，发我**终端里**这三行的输出（不要发别的）：`where python`、`python --version`、`py -3 --version`。

---

**说明**：我没法替你点「应用执行别名」里的开关，只能帮你打开设置页；上面 3～4 步需要你在本机点一下。

---

## 在终端里用 Aider

**1. 进项目根目录（必须是有 `.git` 的仓库根）**

```powershell
cd d:\Desk419
```

**2. 配模型 / API（按你用的厂商二选一或按文档）**

- 在系统或用户里设置环境变量，例如：`ANTHROPIC_API_KEY`、`OPENAI_API_KEY`、`OPENROUTER_API_KEY` 等（以你实际模型为准）。  
- **不要在聊天里贴 Key。**

**当前 PowerShell 会话里临时设置示例**（把占位符换成你的真实 Key，用完可关窗口）：

```powershell
$env:ANTHROPIC_API_KEY = "你的key"
# 或
# $env:OPENAI_API_KEY = "你的key"
```

**3. 启动 Aider**

```powershell
aider
```

或指定模型（名称以 [Aider/文档](https://aider.chat) 与 LiteLLM 为准），例如：

```powershell
aider --model sonnet
# 或
# aider --model gpt-4o
```

**4. 第一次建议**

- 先做一个初始提交，避免「空仓库 + 大堆未跟踪文件」带来干扰，例如只提交你想让 Aider 管的代码：  
  `git add` 需要的路径 → `git commit -m "init"`  
- 大文件、缓存用 **`.aiderignore`** 排除，省 token。  
- 在对话里用 **`/add`** 等把相关文件加进上下文（以你装的版本的内置帮助为准，可打 **`/help`**）。

如果你告诉我打算用的 **模型名字或厂商**（只说是 Anthropic / OpenAI / 本地等即可，不要发 Key），我可以按你的环境写出一条可直接复制的 `aider` 启动命令。

---

Best practices include using a single `.env` file with entries like `ANTHROPIC_API_KEY=...` and leveraging `python-dotenv` to load keys from centralized locations such as `~/.config/aider_api/.env` or a project-local `.env` within the library folder. The library should centralize all API keys and provide functions to fetch credentials for specific models or providers. It should support both direct library usage and CLI integration, such as an `aider-launch` command that sets environment variables before running aider. A `README.md` should be minimal or omitted unless explicitly requested, while `pyproject.toml` or `requirements.txt` should include `python-dotenv`. The `.env.example` file provides placeholders without real secrets, and `.gitignore` should exclude `.env` and `__pycache__` files.</details></think>

- `local_model_api/.gitignore`: .env, __pycache__, *.pyc, .venv
- `local_model_api/.env.example`: contains all supported environment variables with placeholders
- Directory structure: `local_model_api/` with `local_model_api/` as the main package folder containing `__init__.py`, `_dotenv.py`, `resolve.py`, `env.py`, and `__main__.py` files The CLI will be `python -m local_model_api aider` with model name as argument.

The package name `local_model_api` is used in the directory but not in the Python package name to avoid redundancy.

Directory structure:
- `d:\Desk419\local_model_api\` (root)
  - `.gitignore`
  - `.env.example`
  - `requirements.txt`
  - `local_model_api/` (Python package)
    - `__init__.py`
    - `__main__.py`
    - `registry.py`
    - `load_env.py`

`registry.py` maps model name patterns to API key and base URL environment variables for LiteLLM/Aider integration, supporting:
- ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
- OPENAI_API_KEY
- GROQ_API_KEY
- GEMINI_API_KEY (GOOGLE)
- MISTRAL_API_KEY
- OPENROUTER_API_KEY
- DEEPSEEK_API_KEY The `resolve_model_to_provider` function uses ordered prefixes to map model names to their respective providers.

The `apply_keys_for_model` function loads environment variables and sets OS environment variables for the specific provider needed by Aider.

For local models like Ollama, no API key is required; it will be added as a provider with no key.

Providers dictionary includes mappings for:
- OpenAI-compatible models: OPENAI_API_KEY, OPENAI_API_BASE
- Anthropic: ANTHROPIC_API_KEY
- Ollama: no key required, OLLAMA models

The `load_env.py` file handles loading environment variables for the selected provider. The `.env` file should be located at `d:\Desk419\local_model_api\.env`, and `load_dotenv(DOTENV_PATH)` will load it.

The CLI supports two formats:
- `python -m local_model_api aider gpt-4o`  sets environment variables and runs `aider --model gpt-4o`
- `python -m local_model_api run aider gpt-4o extra args`  runs aider with model and additional arguments

Alternatively, using argparse with subcommands:
- `python -m local_model_api aider --model gpt-4o`  passes model argument to aider
- Arguments after `--` are forwarded to aider directly</details></think>

<think><details><summary>Thought Process</summary>
When using argparse, the REMAINDER action captures all remaining command-line arguments into a single list, without any further parsing. This is useful when you want to pass through arguments to another program or handle variable-length argument lists.

- Use `nargs='*'` or `nargs='+'` for variable-length argument lists
- Use `REMAINDER` when you need to capture everything after a certain point
- Arguments after `--` are automatically treated as REMAINDER
- Can be combined with other actions for complex argument structures

Example usage:
```python
parser.add_argument('--foo', nargs='*')
parser.add_argument('remainder', nargs=argparse.REMAINDER)
```

This allows for flexible argument parsing where some arguments are parsed normally while others are captured wholesale. When using subparsers with REMAINDER, arguments after the subcommand are captured as a list. For example, `python -m local_model_api aider -- --model ollama/llama3` ensures `--model` and `gpt-4o` are passed through unchanged.

- Using `--` prevents parent parser from interpreting arguments like `--model` as unknown
- Without `--`, REMAINDER may not work as expected due to argument parsing order
- Subcommands can accept variable-length arguments via `nargs=REMAINDER`</details></think>

已经在你本机加好一个**独立小库** `d:\Desk419\local_model_api\`，用**本地 `.env` 管各厂商 Key**，按 **`aider --model` 的模型名** 自动选厂商并检查 Key，再调起 `aider`。

## 结构

- `local_model_api/.env`：只放在本机，**已加入 `.gitignore`**；把 `d:\Desk419\local_model_api\.env.example` 复制为 `.env` 后填 Key（不要提交仓库）。
- `local_model_api/local_model_api/`
  - `env_store.py`：读 `.env`（可用环境变量 `LOCAL_MODEL_API_ENV` 指向**别的绝对路径**的 `.env`，方便「一份密钥给所有工程」）
  - `resolve.py`：由模型名推断厂商（`gpt*`→OpenAI，`claude`→Anthropic，`ollama/…` 等）
  - `runtime.py`：`get_api_key_for_model`、`require_key_for_model` 供你其它 Python 代码调用
- `pyproject.toml`：已**可编辑安装**并注册命令行 `model-api`

我已在该目录执行过 `pip install -e .`；若换环境，在库根目录再执行一次：

`py -3 -m pip install -e d:\Desk419\local_model_api`

## 终端用法（推荐日常用这个启动 Aider）

在任意目录：

```powershell
# 先检查某个模型会走哪家、Key 是否已配置
model-api info gpt-4o
model-api info ollama/llama3.2

# 加载 .env 后启动 aider（参数全部透传）
cd d:\你的某个仓库
model-api aider -- --model gpt-4o
# 没有 -- 冲突时，也可以：
model-api aider --model gpt-4o
```

```powershell
model-api list-providers
```

## 在 Python 里随模型取 Key

```python
from local_model_api import get_api_key_for_model, load_secrets

load_secrets()
prov, key = get_api_key_for_model("claude-3-5-sonnet-20241022")
# prov: 厂商；key: 有则返回字符串，Ollama 类为 None
```

## 强制指定厂商（不猜名字）

在 `.env` 或系统环境里设：

`LOCAL_MODEL_API_PROVIDER=openai`（或其它已在 `list-providers` 里出现的 id）

这样即使用不典型的 `--model` 名，也按你指定的厂商用对应环境变量里的 Key。

---

接下来你只要：**复制 `.env.example` 为 `.env` 并填入实际 Key**（不要贴到聊天里），再用 `model-api aider -- ...` 跑即可。若你希望**规则/前缀**和某个国产或自建网关完全一致，可以告诉我模型名长什么样，我可以把 `resolve.py` 的匹配表补一行。

---

## 放哪儿？**不要**放进 Cursor 本体目录

- **Cursor/VS Code 安装目录**是程序更新、重装时最容易被**整体替换**的，用户的库和 `.env` 都不该绑在那儿。  
- 更稳妥的是放在**只归你管的位置**，例如本机已用的这种：  
  **`C:\Users\72988\dev\local_model_api`**（或 `%USERPROFILE%\tools\...`，原则一样：固定、不跟某个业务仓库绑死）。

**“不只在 Desk419 里能调用”** 这件事，不取决于文件夹在哪，而取决于**对当前这套 Python 做了可编辑安装**（`pip install -e`）。装好之后，在**任意盘符、任意项目目录**的终端里，只要用的是**同一个 `python`/`py -3`**，都可以：

- 运行 `model-api ...`  
- `import local_model_api`

我已经把库**复制**到 `C:\Users\72988\dev\local_model_api`，并执行了 `pip install -e`，现在 **editable 指向新路径**；`D:\Desk419\local_model_api` 里还留着一份副本，**避免我擅自删你仓库里的东西**。你确认用新位置没问题后，可以**自己删掉** Desk 下那份，只保留 `dev` 里一份，省得改两处。

密钥文件建议只用一处：在 **`C:\Users\72988\dev\local_model_api\.env`** 里按 `.env.example` 建好并填写（你这边之前还没 `.env`，需要你自己拷一份改名填 Key）。

---

## 现在能在终端用 Aider 吗？**能**

本机已确认：

- `aider` 在 **`C:\Users\72988\.local\bin\aider.exe`**，版本 **0.86.2**（PATH 里已有 `.local\bin` 时，任意目录下打 `aider` 即可）。  
- 真正**连上模型**还需要：对应厂商的 **API Key 已进环境**；用我们的封装时，应写在**上面那个** `dev\local_model_api\.env` 里。  

推荐用法（任意工作区、先 `cd` 到**有 Git 的仓库根**再跑）：

```powershell
model-api aider -- --model 你的模型id
# 或
aider --model 你的模型id
```

（后者要在当前会话里**已经**有 Key；前者会先读 `dev\local_model_api\.env` 再启动 `aider`。）

**Ollama 等本机、无需 API Key 的**模型：可以直接 `aider` / `model-api aider`；有云端 Key 的，先把 `.env` 配好再跑。
